verses.text: The Levites ask for cities; they are given as God commanded. Levite cities. They dwell among the tribes.

The cities are assigned by lot to the families. By lot. God appoints their places.

God gave them all the land and rest; 'there failed not ought of any good thing.' Fulfilled. God kept every promise.
